message:
chore: add destructive command guard (dcg) configuration

Initialize the .dcg/ directory with an empty allowlist.toml, enabling
the destructive command guard safety tool for this project. The dcg tool
intercepts potentially destructive shell commands (rm -rf, git reset
--hard, etc.) and requires explicit allowlisting before they can execute,
providing a safety net for multi-agent development workflows.

The allowlist starts empty, meaning all destructive commands will be
blocked by default until explicitly approved.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
